      "direction": "bullish",
      "sector": "XLY",
      "rationale": "Rising last-minute travel demand benefits discretionary and airline-related stocks."

      "entry": "If weekly Google Trends for 'last minute flight deals' rises 30% WoW",
      "exit": "After 4 weeks or if trend declines 15% WoW",

    },

    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "medium",

  },
